ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) has acquired a 40% equity stake in Tiki Tar and Shell India Private Limited (TTSIPL) for Rs. 85 Crores, a strategic move to capitalize on India's booming infrastructure sector and the rapidly growing market for Value-Added Bitumen. While this expands BPCL's market presence, TTSIPL's turnover experienced a material decline from INR 545.16 Crores in March 2025 to INR 404.60 Crores in March 2026, which warrants further analysis regarding the target's performance stability.
